Localization.Description: The use of a script from a modified Impacket toolkit is detected. This allows to remotely dump the lsass process memory.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started a process with a base64 encoded command, which triggered a process with known Impacket tool patterns in the command line: "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
Process {subject.process.name} added registry key values {reason} on host {event_src.host}. These key values are known Impacket tool patterns.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} remotely used files {reason} on host {event_src.host}. These files are probably a malicious SSP library and an lsass dump. This indicates possible use of a modified Impacket tool.
